title: Ghost in the Shell: Arise - Border 3: Ghost Tears
original_title: 攻殻機動隊ARISE border:3 Ghost Tears
overview: Posing as lovers on vacation, Motoko and Batou work to try to stop a terrorist organization whose symbol is the Scrasath. Meanwhile, Togusa investigates a murder of a man who possessed a prosthetic leg manufactured by the Mermaid's Leg corporation.
